ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the artist */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "composers" (
  "composer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each composer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the composer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the composer */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the composer */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the composer's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album's cover art */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the music track */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the track in minutes and seconds */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Artists table */,
  "composer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Composers table */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Albums table */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Genres table */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Tracks table */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Artists table */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the artist in the collaboration (e.g., 'featured', 'producer') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Users table (not included in this schema) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)
